tasks.label: check:bash:shellcheck
tasks.command: if command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1; then find . -type f -name '*.sh' -print0 | xargs -0 shellcheck; else echo 'shellcheck is not installed; skipping'; fi

tasks.label: check:bash:format
tasks.command: if command -v shfmt >/dev/null 2>&1; then find . -type f -name '*.sh' -print0 | xargs -0 shfmt -d; else echo 'shfmt is not installed; skipping'; fi

tasks.label: format:bash
tasks.detail: Writes formatting changes with shfmt -w. Use only when you intend to modify shell files.
